title: canimcp interim MCP conformance report
description: Interim conformance-run report shape consumed by scripts/ingest-conformance.ts. Loosely tracks SEP-1627; SEP-1627's own output format may still be in flux, so this is our own interim adapter shape. See docs/conformance-format.md.

run_url.description: URL of the conformance run / artifact. Recorded on each produced cell as `source`.

run_date.description: Date the run executed (YYYY-MM-DD). Recorded on each produced cell as `last_verified`.

spec_version.description: MCP spec version the run tested against (e.g. 2025-06-18).

results.description: One entry per client tested in this run.

clientInfo_name.description: params.clientInfo.name reported by the client under test; used to match a data/clients/<id>.yaml record.

version.description: Client version string under test. Recorded on each produced cell as `version_tested`.

feature_id.description: A canimcp feature id from data/features.yaml (e.g. tools.call). Unknown ids are rejected by the ingester.

outcome.description: pass => status:yes, fail => status:no, skip => leave cell untouched/unknown.

notes.description: Optional free-text detail carried onto the cell's `notes`.
